name: Fundo Investimento Imobiliario Fii Ubs (Br) Recebveis Imobiliarios
summary: RECR11.SA is a Brazilian real estate investment fund (FII) managed by UBS, focusing on real estate receivables, indicating investments in debt instruments related to the real estate sector. The fund distributes income generated from these receivables to its shareholders, aiming to provide returns from the Brazilian real estate market.
